title: Open manhole on Mirpur 10 roundabout
description: There is a completely open manhole near the metro rail station entrance. It is extremely dangerous for pedestrians, especially at night when the streetlights are dim.

updates.note: Assigned to DNCC Ward 14 maintenance team for inspection.
updates.author: DNCC Admin

title: Illegal waste dumping near school
description: Every night, unknown trucks are dumping industrial waste near the Dhanmondi Boys School wall. The smell is unbearable and it's a major health hazard for the students.

title: Broken streetlight causing accidents
description: The main streetlight at the Banani intersection has been broken for 3 weeks. There have been two minor collisions already.

updates.note: The streetlight bulb has been replaced and the circuit board repaired.
updates.author: DESCO Field Team

title: Severe waterlogging after 10 mins of rain
description: The entire Shantinagar intersection floods waist-deep after minimal rain. The drainage pipes seem to be clogged by plastic waste from the nearby market.

updates.note: WASA informed. Scheduled for pipe jetting next week.
updates.author: WASA Inspector

title: Unregulated construction blocking sidewalk
description: A developer is building a high-rise and has dumped sand and bricks completely blocking the footpath on Satmasjid Road, forcing people to walk into heavy traffic.

title: Fallen tree blocking lane 4
description: Yesterday's storm uprooted a massive tree. It crashed into an electric pole and is blocking the entirety of Lane 4 in Baridhara DOHS. Power is also unstable here now.

updates.note: Emergency response team dispatched alongside DESCO technicians.
updates.author: DOHS Council

updates.note: Tree cleared, road reopened, and power restored.
updates.author: DOHS Council

title: Mosquito infestation due to stagnant water
description: There is an abandoned plot of land next to our apartment building that has become a massive breeding pool for mosquitoes. Dengue cases are rising nearby.

updates.note: Health dept notified. Fogging scheduled for tommorrow and a notice issued to the land owner.
updates.author: City Health Admin

title: Broken pedestrian bridge stairs
description: The stairs on the south side of the Farmgate foot overbridge have rusted through and someone could easily fall through the gaps.

updates.note: This bridge is scheduled for complete demolition next month as part of the expressway project. Immediate repairs cancelled.
updates.author: Transport Authority Admin

title: Extortion ring at local kitchen market
description: A group of thugs are forcibly collecting excessive 'tolls' from poor vegetable vendors every morning. It's driving up food prices for the residents.

title: ট্র্যাফিক সিগন্যাল কাজ করছে না
description: All the lights at the intersection are staying red permanently, causing absolute chaos and gridlock that stretches back 3 kilometers.

updates.note: Traffic police deployed manually. Signal maintenance team informed.
updates.author: Traffic Control

updates.note: Control box motherboard was fried. Replaced and functioning normally.
updates.author: Traffic Control

title: Dangerous stray dog pack
description: A pack of highly aggressive stray dogs has chased down and bitten two school children this week. Residents are terrified to walk outside.

updates.note: Animal control unit scheduled to visit the area for humane relocation.
updates.author: City Admin

title: Public park occupied by drug peddlers
description: The local park is completely unusable for families. After 6 PM, it is entirely occupied by gangs openly selling and consuming narcotics.

title: Leaking underground gas pipe
description: Strong smell of natural gas continuously emitting from a crack in the pavement. It's right next to a busy tea stall where people are smoking. Extremely high risk of explosion.

updates.note: Emergency flagged! Titas Gas transmission unit en route.
updates.author: Titas Admin

updates.note: Valve shut off, leak welded securely. High pressure tests passed.
updates.author: Titas Field Team
